mac.notes: Universal Control fixes: keyboard now types on the phone (grant Input Monitoring when asked), and the slide-off-the-right-edge trigger works reliably (⌃⌥⌘ also works while Bifrost is in front). Slide the cursor off the right edge or press ⌃⌥⌘ to control your phone.

android.notes: Universal Control: the Mac can now drive a cursor on your phone (with the Mac's mouse & keyboard) — a pointer overlay appears when the Mac takes control. Needs the “Bifrost screen control” accessibility service.
